title: Finolex Industries Advisory Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Finolex Industries Advisory Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Finolex Industries Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Bhubaneswar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Finolex Industries Advisory Limited:
Finolex Industries Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Industries Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
